summary: Contextual Chat Feature - All 14 backend tests passed (100%), All frontend tests passed. Lead and Deal contextual chat channels work correctly with entity info cards, sidebar grouping, and message persistence.
passed_tests: Backend: Contextual chat requires authentication (401)
Backend: Invalid context type returns 400
Backend: Non-existent lead returns 404
Backend: Non-existent deal returns 404
Backend: Create lead contextual channel - returns correct channel_id and channel_type
Backend: Get existing lead channel returns same channel
Backend: Lead channel contains entity info (first_name, last_name, company)
Backend: Create deal contextual channel - returns correct channel_id and channel_type
Backend: Deal channel contains entity info (name, value, stage)
Backend: Send message to lead channel
Backend: Send message to deal channel
Backend: Get messages from contextual channel
Backend: Contextual lead channel appears in channel list
Backend: Contextual deal channel appears in channel list
Frontend: Lead page has 'Discuss Lead' icon button (MessageSquare)
Frontend: Clicking Discuss Lead navigates to /chat?type=lead&id={lead_id}
Frontend: Lead info card visible in chat header (blue bg-blue-50)
Frontend: Lead info card shows name, job title, company, status badge
Frontend: 'Lead Discussions' group visible in sidebar
Frontend: 'View lead' link visible in header
Frontend: Deal page has 'Discuss Deal' dropdown menu item
Frontend: Clicking Discuss Deal navigates to /chat?type=deal&id={deal_id}
Frontend: Deal info card visible in chat header (emerald bg-emerald-50)
Frontend: Deal info card shows name, value, stage, probability
Frontend: 'Deal Discussions' group visible in sidebar
Frontend: 'View deal' link visible in header
Frontend: Messages in contextual channels persist and display correctly
Frontend: Chat input and send button work in contextual channels
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_John ChatLead and TEST_Deal_Chat test entities during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contextual chat feature fully tested and working. URL params: ?type=lead&id={lead_id} for leads, ?type=deal&id={deal_id} for deals. Backend endpoint: GET /api/chat/context/{type}/{id} creates or returns existing channel. Sidebar groups channels by type: 'Channels', 'Lead Discussions', 'Deal Discussions'. Entity info cards display lead/deal details in chat header. Messages persist in contextual channels same as regular channels.

lead_discuss_button.location: Lead row - direct MessageSquare icon button
lead_discuss_button.dropdown_alternative: Also available in lead dropdown menu

sidebar_grouping.icons: UserCircle for leads, Target for deals
